title: No LAN Cheating
description: Removes the "Allow Cheats" button from the "Open to LAN" menu.
body:
### Functionality
This mod removes the "Allow Cheats" button from the "Open to LAN"/"Create New World" screens to disallow players from using cheats when opening their world to LAN. This can be useful if a player doesn't want to have an easy option to turn on cheats in their world.\
This mod is client side only, it does nothing when installed on a server.

No LAN Cheating also supports the [LAN World Plug-n-Play mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcwifipnp), editing its screen to remove the relevant cheat buttons.

#### Configuration
There are two configuration options:
- **removeButtonInOpenToLANScreen** - Removes the "Allow Cheats" button in the "Open to LAN" screen. (The button is removed by default)
- **removeButtonInCreateNewWorldScreen** - Removes the "Allow Cheats" button in the "Create New World" screen. (The button is shown by default)

### Showcase
As of Minecraft 1.19.3, the Open to LAN screen looks a bit different. This does not change how the mod interacts with the screen, the Allow Cheats button is the one being removed.

With the mod installed:
![With the mod installed](https://i.imgur.com/veIrW8K.png)

Without the mod installed:
![Without the mod installed](https://i.imgur.com/9oOyPR8.png)

You are allowed to use this mod in any modpack
